tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set srcaddr "all"
set action block
set protocol icmp
set status enable
set vdom "root"
set interface "port1"
set packet-rate 100
next
end
show firewall DoS-policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP_FILTER
 permit icmp any any
exit
class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
 match access-group name ICMP_FILTER
exit
policy-map COPP_POLICY
 class ICMP_CLASS
  police 10000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
 exit
exit
control-plane
 service-policy input COPP_POLICY
end
show running-config | include access-list|class-map|policy-map|control-plane"}
